[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010010 2
1 0100000 1
2 0110100 3
3 1001110 4
4 0111111 6
5 0000001 1
6 1100110 4
7 0011111 5

01 10 0010010 2 match 0
12 21 0000000 a
23 32 0100000 1 match 1
34 43 1000000 1
45 54 0011100 3
56 65 0000010 1
67 76 0100010 2
70 07 0010010 2 match 0

02 20 0000000 a
13 31 0000010 1
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0000011 2
46 64 1000000 1
57 75 0011010 3
60 06 1000010 2
71 17 0010010 2 match 0

03 30 1000011 3
14 41 0010000 1
25 52 0000000 a
36 63 1100010 3
47 74 0011000 2
50 05 0010111 4
61 16 0000010 1
72 27 0100000 1 match 1

04 40 1010100 3
15 51 0010010 2 match 0
26 62 0100000 1 match 1
37 73 0100010 2
